prTitle: feat: add ProgressRingView and StreakBannerView dashboard components
prBody:
## Summary

- **ProgressRingView** (`FitnessTracker/Features/Dashboard/Components/ProgressRingView.swift`): reusable animated circular progress ring. Accepts `progress` (0–1, clamped at both ends), `color`, `title`, `value`, and `unit`. Animates from 0 to target on appear with `withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: 0.8))`; re-animates smoothly when the data source updates. Two Xcode Previews included (normal data, clamped edge cases).

- **StreakBannerView** (`FitnessTracker/Features/Dashboard/Components/StreakBannerView.swift`): banner displaying the user's consecutive-day streak with a flame SF Symbol icon and a best-streak secondary stat. Hidden (the view emits nothing) when `currentStreak == 0`. Slides in from the top with a spring animation on first appear. Adds milestone badges at 7 / 14 / 30 day thresholds (Week+, On fire!, Legend). Two Xcode Previews included (active streaks, zero-streak hidden state).

### Acceptance criteria met
- ProgressRingView animates from 0 to target via `withAnimation` on appear ✓
- Ring clamps progress values outside 0–1 ✓
- StreakBannerView displays streak count and is hidden when streak is 0 ✓
- Both components render correctly in Xcode Previews with sample data ✓

Closes #32
